name: Cucumber Dill Dip #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumber and remove any seeds.
2. Finely dice the cucumber.
3. Using a colander, squeeze out any excess water from the diced cucumber.
4. Place the squeezed cucumber in a bowl and mix with the pepper and dill.
5. Add the mayonnaise, sour cream, and remaining ingredients (either fresh or dried dill).
6. Mix thoroughly until well combined.
7. Cover the mixture and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Makes about 3 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: broccoli, cauliflower, radishes, carrots, onion crackers.
